chunks.page_summary: This article outlines the benefits of integrating Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA for remote monitoring and details its compatibility with various communication protocols like Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, and MQTT, along with an easy implementation method using Node-RED.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Benefits of using Rheonics Sensors with Ignition SCADA for Remote Monitoring

Modified on: Thu, 18 Sep, 2025 at 3:20 PM

What is the purpose of this article?
This article shows how integrating Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA is a major advantage for modern industrial operations. Combining Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA provides an advanced solution for real-time monitoring, data visualization, and process control, enhancing operational efficiency and reliability.

1. What is Ignition SCADA?
Ignition SCADA by Inductive Automation® is a software solution that is able to connect different industrial devices. Through the Designer IDE, Ignition allows the creation of customizable dashboards and HMI screens, enabling visualization of Rheonics sensors' data. Moreover, Ignition allows the addition of modules with different advantages, such as MQTT communication, which can be utilized for remote monitoring.

2. Benefits of Remote Monitoring
Remote monitoring enables operators to view live Rheonics sensor parameters from different locations and interfaces. This enables fast intervention when readings are incorrect, and ensures operators' security by not having to enter a dangerous area. Additionally, it allows accessibility when teams are in different locations and want to visualize the sensor parameters. On the other hand, Ignition offers the option to integrate alarms and reports to have the data well-organized and alert the operators of any unusual readings.

3. Integrability with Multiple Communication Protocols
Ignition's compatibility with multiple industrial communication standards makes it simple to integrate Rheonics sensors into a SCADA system. This makes integration with Rheonics Sensor Module Electronics (SME) straightforward, whether they communicate over Modbus RTU (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005), Modbus TCP (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000297635), or MQTT.

3.1. MQTT Integration
Ignition counts with MQTT (Transmission, Engine, and Distributor) modules that allow remote monitoring. These modules let sensor data be published to a remote MQTT broker. This means that as long as the Rheonics sensor data is sent to a broker, Ignition can subscribe to topics and display the parameters instantly, regardless of the location where the parameters were published.

To learn how to connect Ignition SCADA to a MQTT broker to visualize Rheonics sensor data refer to Using Ignition SCADA to Visualize Rheonics Sensor Data via MQTT (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418666).

4. Easy implementation with MQTT
A user-friendly way of integrating Ignition for remote monitoring is using Node-RED (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418666), which is a friendly programming tool that can be used to read data through Modbus TCP or RTU and forward this data to an MQTT broker for remote access through topics.

Figure 1: Node-RED interface

To learn the basic steps for setting up Node-RED, visit the Node-RED Setup and MQTT for Rheonics Sensors (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418666).
key_facts: Integrating Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA offers advanced solutions for real-time monitoring, data visualization, and process control in industrial operations.
Ignition SCADA, developed by Inductive Automation®, is a software solution capable of connecting various industrial devices and creating customizable dashboards and HMI screens.
Ignition SCADA supports MQTT communication through additional modules, enabling remote monitoring of sensor data.

Remote monitoring provides benefits such as fast intervention for incorrect readings, enhanced operator security by avoiding dangerous areas, and improved accessibility for geographically dispersed teams.
Ignition allows for the integration of alarms and reports to better organize data and alert operators to unusual readings.
Rheonics sensors can be easily integrated into a SCADA system due to Ignition's compatibility with industrial communication standards like Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, and MQTT.
Ignition's MQTT modules allow sensor data to be published to a remote MQTT broker, enabling instant display of parameters irrespective of their publication location.
Node-RED offers a user-friendly method for integrating Ignition for remote monitoring, by reading data via Modbus TCP/RTU and forwarding it to an MQTT broker.
The document was last modified on Thursday, September 18, 2025, at 3:20 PM.
warnings_notes: To learn how to connect Ignition SCADA to a MQTT broker to visualize Rheonics sensor data, refer to Using Ignition SCADA to Visualize Rheonics Sensor Data via MQTT.
To learn the basic steps for setting up Node-RED, visit the Node-RED Setup and MQTT for Rheonics Sensors.

chunks.page_summary: This page details the integration of Rheonics inline viscometers and density sensors with Ignition SCADA, Node-RED, and MQTT for remote data visualization, monitoring, and control.
chunks.extracted_text:
Using the Ignition MQTT modules, it is possible to subscribe to the topics assigned on Node-RED and visualize the sensor readings through Ignition.
Figure 2: Connection of Rheonics SME, Node-RED, MQTT and Ignition
To learn how to send Rheonics sensor data to an MQTT broker using Node-RED refer to Integrating Rheonics Sensors with Node-RED and MQTT for Remote Data Access.

5. Friendly interface
As mentioned before, Ignition's Designer IDE makes it simple to build intuitive and friendly displays. For Rheonics sensors, Ignition templates are available through Ignition Exchange (https://inductiveautomation.com/exchange/), which is a public library of community-developed resources. These templates can be customized to show parameters such as viscosity, density, and temperature, with graphics and alarms for specific needs.
Figure 3: Rheonics sensor template in Ignition Designer

6. Conclusion
By combining Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA, operators get a flexible and scalable remote monitoring solution that enables:
*   Continuous data acquisition from multiple locations.
*   Operator safety by allowing data visualization without entering dangerous areas.
*   Fast integration with other software tools, such as Node-RED, for remote visualization.
*   Parameter access via Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP communication protocols through Node-RED.
*   An easy-to-use Designer interface with Rheonics templates adaptable for various applications.

7. Resources
*   Modbus RTU (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/folders/81000217005)
*   Modbus TCP (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/articles/81000297635)
*   Using Ignition SCADA to Visualize Rheonics Sensor Data via MQTT (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418655)
*   Node-RED Setup and MQTT for Rheonics Sensors (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418666)
*   Integrating Rheonics Sensors with Node-RED and MQTT for Remote Data Access (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000418653)
*   Innovative SCADA Software for Process Control and Data Management (https://www.inductiveautomation.com/scada-software/)
*   Visualization and Dashboards (https://www.docs.inductiveautomation.com/docs/7.9/visualization-and-dashboards)
*   Ignition Exchange (https://inductiveautomation.com/exchange/)
key_facts: Ignition MQTT modules allow subscribing to Node-RED topics and visualizing Rheonics sensor readings through Ignition.
Rheonics sensor data can be sent to an MQTT broker using Node-RED.
Ignition's Designer IDE simplifies the creation of intuitive and friendly display interfaces.
Rheonics provides Ignition templates through the Ignition Exchange for visualizing sensor data.
These templates are customizable to display parameters such as viscosity, density, temperature, along with graphics and alarms.
Combining Rheonics sensors with Ignition SCADA delivers a flexible and scalable remote monitoring solution.
The integrated solution enables continuous data acquisition from multiple locations.
It enhances operator safety by allowing data visualization without needing to enter hazardous areas.
The system supports fast integration with other software tools like Node-RED for remote visualization.
Parameter access is facilitated via Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP communication protocols through Node-RED.
The Designer interface is easy-to-use, with Rheonics templates adaptable for various applications.
